title: Irish Lamb Stew
description: A hearty and comforting Irish lamb stew made with tender lamb, potatoes, and carrots.
instructions: 1. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Brown the lamb shoulder on all sides, then remove it from the pot.
3. Add the onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the carrots and potatoes to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add the flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
6. Add the browned lamb, rosemary, and thyme to the pot.
7. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours.
9. Serve hot, garnished with fresh rosemary and thyme.
